content.text: I'll write a concise risk assessment based on the sprint assignments and testing log.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Based on: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt, helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt (through 2026-07-11)

Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline:

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization (Amir Hassan)
   - Status: Blocked; due 2026-07-15
   - Linked open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH): MM/DD/YYYY normalization fails for ~40% of Meridian data
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data due the same day as the task (2026-07-15)
   - Related open defect HEL-D-015 (HIGH): large-file memory overflow also owned by Amir
   - High risk of missing deadline due to external dependency and open defects

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning (Nadia Petrov)
   - Status: already marked At Risk; due 2026-07-16
   - Explicitly flagged in assignments; late delivery would block UAT

3. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load (Derek Okafor)
   - Status: Not Started; due 2026-07-18
   - Mid-sprint with no progress; related dashboard load test (TC-604) not yet run
   - Tight remaining window to complete work and validation

Secondary / watch-list items (elevated concern, not as clearly overdue-bound yet):
- HEL-241 (due 2026-07-14, In Progress) and HEL-248 (due 2026-07-14, In Progress): due imminently relative to log date 2026-07-11
- HEL-242 (due 2026-07-16, In Progress): chart-related tests still incomplete (TC-602 in progress; TC-603 not run)
- HEL-245 (due 2026-07-18, In Progress): data pipeline suite has 2 open FAILs (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015), which may delay completion

Summary: Primary deadline risks are HEL-243 (Blocked + HIGH defects), HEL-246 (At Risk), and HEL-247 (Not Started late in sprint).

content.text: Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`. Primary risks: **HEL-243** (blocked + open HIGH defects), **HEL-246** (already At Risk), and **HEL-247** (not started late in the sprint).
